message:
feat(vdbe): expression index and partial index support in codegen and query planning

Major index metadata upgrade enabling advanced SQLite index features:

IndexSchema extensions:
- Add key_expressions: Vec<String> for executable SQL per key term
  (expression indexes leave columns empty to prevent fast-path misuse)
- Add where_clause: Option<String> for partial index predicates as SQL text
- Add helper methods: key_term_count(), key_term_sql(pos),
  supports_direct_column_lookup(), supports_replace_cleanup_meta(),
  key_label() for human-readable diagnostics

Index insert codegen:
- New emit_index_predicate_guard() emits VDBE guard to skip partial-index
  maintenance for non-matching rows
- New emit_index_key_term() evaluates key terms flexibly (simple columns
  or expressions)
- Refactored emit_index_inserts() to use predicate guards and flexible
  key evaluation with key_label() for UNIQUE violation messages

Query planning safeguards:
- index_for_column() now checks supports_direct_column_lookup() before
  using fast path
- find_upsert_target_index() verifies direct column support

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
